tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, elevated creatinine, and proteinuria, suggesting possible chronic kidney disease with impaired glucose metabolism. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, high protein, ketones, bilirubin) may indicate renal dysfunction and possible dehydration or catabolic state. No evidence of urinary infection. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment of glycemic status and underlying causes for hypoglycemia.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
